Source.description: The source of the problem. i.e where the error occurred

ReasonCode.description: A code defining the error, as defined in documentation

Description.description: A description for this specific occurrence of the above ReasonCode

Recoverable.description: Whether or not retrying this request could result in a successful response.

Details.description: More details of this specific error. This is an optional field and is sometimes used to give a more comprehensive description of the error that has occurred, when required.
